productDisplayName: Puma Women Core Lite Grip White Duffle Bag
description: C'mon, admit it ladies! One look at this puma Core Lite Grip bag and you can't wait to take it with you on your next travel! Length: 50.5 cm 150D polyester lining with PU backing for durability Shell made of 100% 330T twill nylon with PU backing for durability and easey cleaning Features two-way zip opening for the main compartment Internal zip pocket Zippered front pocket Foam-padded base Webbing carry handles Large, colored metallic zipper pulls with classic puma branding Colored Puma branded metallic zipper pull on internal zip pocket All-over graphic print with integrated cat logos Embroidered Cat logo on front Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
